source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) calibrated from consulting engagements. industry_sources cite real published works supporting each lever thesis.

levers.lever_name: Claims Processing Automation & AI Fraud Detection
levers.description: Deploy straight-through processing (STP) for low-value claims; AI models for fraud scoring; automated surveyor assignment for motor OD claims.
industry_sources: IRDAI Annual Report 2023-24 (irdai.gov.in) — claims settlement efficiency targets; STP claims reducing servicing cost
ICICI Lombard FY25 Annual Report (BSE 540716) — AI-driven claims: 90%+ motor claims settled within 3 hours via automated surveyor
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — claims automation savings calibrated from 3 general insurance transformation engagements

levers.description: Grow policyholder acquisition through direct web/app channels to reduce agent commission ratio. Partnered with aggregators (Policybazaar, Coverfox) for lead generation at lower cost than traditional agency.
industry_sources: IRDAI Annual Report 2023-24 — digital channel GWP share growing; web aggregator regulation enabling transparent pricing
Policybazaar (PB Fintech) FY25 Annual Report (BSE 543390) — aggregator commission 8-12% vs. agency 15-20% for comparable business
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — channel shift savings from 2 general insurance distribution strategy mandates

levers.description: Re-structure catastrophe and proportional reinsurance treaties; increase retention for low-volatility lines; renegotiate terms with RI partners.
industry_sources: GIC Re FY25 Annual Report (BSE 540755) — domestic reinsurance market; cession rates and treaty terms for Indian insurers
IRDAI Reinsurance Regulations 2018 amended 2022 (irdai.gov.in) — Indian First rule mandating GIC Re as preferred reinsurer
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — reinsurance optimisation savings from 2 general insurance actuarial reviews

levers.description: Exit sub-threshold branches; convert to digital service hubs. Rationalise POSP (Point of Sales Person) network to productive agents; digitise policy issuance.
industry_sources: IRDAI Agent Regulation — POSP digital licensing enabling direct policy issuance without branch infrastructure
New India Assurance FY25 Annual Report (BSE 540769) — branch rationalisation cited as structural cost reduction initiative
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — agency network rationalisation savings from 3 general insurance distribution mandates

levers.description: Replace legacy PAS with cloud-native platforms to reduce IT maintenance cost, improve STP rates, and support new product launch speed.
industry_sources: Gartner — Insurance Core System Modernisation 2024 (gartner.com) — cloud PAS reduces IT maintenance 25-35% vs. on-premise legacy
ICICI Lombard FY25 Annual Report — technology investments in digital-first model cited as structural advantage in combined ratio management
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — PAS modernisation savings from 1 general insurance IT transformation mandate

levers.description: Deploy motor telematics (OBD dongles, app-based) and IoT sensors (home, health) for usage-based pricing; reduce adverse selection and improve loss ratio.
industry_sources: IRDAI Sandbox Regulations 2019 amended 2023 (irdai.gov.in) — UBI (usage-based insurance) regulatory sandbox enabling telematics
ICICI Lombard InstaSpect and telematics programme — improved loss ratio on telematics-priced motor book
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — telematics loss ratio improvement calibrated from 2 Indian motor insurer programmes

levers.description: Centralise HR ops, finance ops, IT procurement across group entities. Standardise vendor agreements for printing, courier, office supplies.
industry_sources: Hackett Group G&A Benchmarks 2024 (thehackettgroup.com) — world-class G&A at 1.1% of revenue; shared services reduces G&A 20-30%
IRDAI Annual Report 2023-24 — expense-of-management ratio as regulatory metric; group-level efficiency initiatives
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — shared services savings calibrated from 2 insurance group G&A transformation mandates
